title: Safe and Alive: Why You Need Both
description:
Everyone says find someone safe OR alive. They're wrong. The real love makes you both. Here's what that moment looks like.

#Shorts #Poetry #Love #Relationships #RealLove
hook_visual: Close-up of two people's faces in candlelight, eyes meeting. Text overlay appears suddenly: 'Safe or Alive? Choose wrong.'
end_screen_cta: Text overlay fades in: 'Which have you found?' with link to full essay in bio. Voiceover: 'Read the full poem and essay in the link.'
